text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One key application is text understanding, where computers analyze written content to grasp its meaning. This technology also powers translation tools, allowing people to convert text between languages quickly. Another important use is sentiment analysis, which examines words to determine if a message is positive, negative, or neutral. Additionally, chatbots rely on NLP to hold conversations with users, answering questions or providing support. As NLP continues to improve, it makes communication between humans and machines more natural and efficient.
